lifecycle.note: Early signals detected in adjacent market segment. Three independent sources confirmed directional opportunity.
Leadership synthesized competing signals and confirmed strategic relevance.
Three entry options designed and pressure-tested against constraints.
Architecture review confirmed Option B scales without structural compromise.
Decision committed. Movement authorized with 90-day execution window.

candidateBeliefs.statement: The adjacent market window is time-bounded and structurally favorable for early entry.

evidence.summary: Competitor exit confirmed via public filing and customer migration data.
Three enterprise RFIs received within 14 days of competitor announcement.
Regulatory timeline aligns with 90-day execution window.

confidence.rationale: Multiple independent signals converge. Evidence is strong and directionally consistent. Timing pressure is real.
